Sage Bot Item Code: T229


Other locations the gear can be found
Donkey
Glint of Ruby Elder Totem

Once in a while, the unit petrifies 3 random enemy units for 2 sec., and casts improved withering on them. The petrified enemy units cannot move, and take 20% more damage. When units are afflicted with improved withering, 2 random positive effects are removed from each of the targets, and all their stats are reduced by 20% for 3 sec.
These enemy units also receive pure damage equal to 20% of their maximum health.

- Level 20
Once in a while, the unit petrifies 3 random enemy units for 3 sec., and casts improved withering on them. The petrified enemy units cannot move, and take 30% more damage.
When units are afflicted with improved withering, 3 random positive effects are removed from each of the targets, and all their stats are reduced by 25% for 4 sec.
These enemy units also receive pure damage equal to 25% of their maximum health

- Level 40
Once in a while, the unit petrifies 3 random enemy units for 4 sec., and casts improved withering on them. The petrified enemy units cannot move, and take 40% more damage. When units are afflicted with improved withering, 4 random positive effects are removed from each of the targets, and all their stats are reduced by 30% for 5 sec. These enemy units also receive pure damage equal to 30% of their maximum health.

Requirements: 90
